prompt: design a control center for branch managers when they log in. should help them see what's happening across their branch in one screen — open cash drawers, today's sales vs target, stock that's running low, any pending purchase approvals.

assertions.text: Agent recognized 'control center' as a dashboard task
Persona (branch manager) is explicitly carried into Phase 2 IA
Each user-named widget mapped to a real StockFlow action or hook path
Mapping table in RUN-NOTES.md references actual paths under actions/ and hooks/
No widgets added for excluded domains (HR/Presence, AP/AR, ClientOrder, commercial agents)
DASHBOARD-SPEC.md exists with branch-manager persona clearly stated
Sample widget (cash-drawers-strip.tsx) exists with real-time strategy noted (per project override polling rules)
Sample widget uses i18n, theme tokens, real data hook reference
